meaning: v.两倍,快步走,加倍努力 vbl.两倍,快步走,加倍努力
examples: Hospital admissions for asthma attacks have doubled.
I was doubled over with pain.
The water company Thames Water has doubled the salary of its chief executive, Bill Alexander.
Mild to moderate mental illness also nearly doubled, from 9.7 percent to 19.9 percent.
